distinctive_elements: electric guitar sound created using FM synthesizer
distortion sound effects for guitar simulation
heavy metal aesthetic adapted to Mega Drive sound chip

notes.limitation: Wikipedia source documents sound department approach and general audio aesthetic but does not provide specific tempo, key, chord progression, or per-stage music data. No track-by-track musical analysis is available in provided sources.
notes.key_finding: Sound team led by Naosuke Arai were heavy metal fans who developed methods to create electric guitar sounds using the Mega Drive's FM synthesizer, ultimately using distortion sound effects to achieve the desired result.
